content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty marginally positive (+0.12%) with energy/metals leading and PSU banks weak (-1.44%). VIX easing to 18 suggests stable conditions but heavy earnings calendar this week. Book is 59% deployed with multiple positions just opened — focus is on managing existing exposure, not adding more.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23999,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L -4% but SL at 76.50 still gives ~2 more pts of room. PSU bank index weak today but Q4 fundamentals (PAT +35%, GNPA 1.45%) intact. Price at 78.26 above S1 (78.36 close enough). Let SL do its job — do not modify."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.98,
      "new_target": 1090.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Strongest performer at +6.3%. SL already raised to 1029.98 (above entry — locked-in profit). Tightening target slightly to 1090 (closer to R2 1013 zone breakout extension) for higher probability of hit. SL stays at current 1029.98 — already trailed, no further tightening needed since stock just gapped and could pull back."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position at -1%. Gold consolidating; FOMC and US GDP this week could re-ignite. SL at 119 gives ~4% room. Acts as portfolio diversifier — hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1413.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (1413). No-op modify avoided — actually current stored SL is 1413 and entry is 1412.94, essentially BE already. Skipping this MODIFY since values match. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 30 (T+2) — binary event. P&L -1.9%, SL at 2295 gives ~1.3% buffer. Letting position ride into earnings with current SL — Nestle's strong print is positive read-through. If results disappoint, SL handles it."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 420.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.6% gain, near 52-week high (414.40). SL already at 406 (above entry 404.50 = breakeven+). Tightening target slightly to 420 (just below R2 416 + breakout extension) since stock is already at resistance. SL unchanged since already at BE."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.3%, just opened. SL at 1770 (~1.3% below CMP) is tight. Stock at 52-week highs after 39% monthly rally — overbought risk real. Let SL handle it; do not loosen."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Near flat at -0.2%. Organon acquisition catalyst intact but high volume on flat day suggests distribution. SL at 1720 (-0.8%) is tight — let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Just opened, near breakeven. SL 318 (~0.8% below CMP) is appropriately tight. Power cluster already heavy in book (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER) — no adds, just hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "PSU bank weakness today; SL at 76.50 will trigger if thesis breaks. No action."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.98,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed up to 1029.98 (above entry, locking ~4.7% gain). Maintain — don't tighten further as gap-up needs room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; SL at 119 gives appropriate buffer for ETF volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (1413 vs entry 1412.94). No further action."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings T+2; SL 2295 in place. Let market decide."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 406 (above entry 404.50), locked breakeven+. At 52w high resistance — let it test."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL at 1770 already accounts for overbought condition."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL 1720; M&A catalyst still in play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near entry; tight SL 318 appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUBANK, MANAPPURAM, INDUSINDBK, M&MFIN, VBL all flagged on strong Q4 prints but I am NOT adding given the book is 59% deployed with multiple newly-opened positions (cluster risk: PNBHOUSING + MAHABANK + INDUSINDBK would all be financials). VBL up 30% in April — chasing 52w high is exactly the failure mode. Will reassess after current positions resolve. PHARMABEES/HINDZINC/TATAPOWER pending LIMIT orders are still working — leaving them; if they don't fill in 1-2 sessions I'll cancel.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavy on power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER ~25% combined) plus FMCG (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR). With 59% deployed, daily P&L flat at +0.08%, and HUL earnings binary in 2 days, deployment hysteresis applies — default disposition is NO new entries. Three pending LIMIT orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) would push deployment beyond comfort zone if they fill. Will cancel TATAPOWER pending if not filled today (would over-concentrate power cluster). Win rate 21% over 5 days but profit factor 2.2x is acceptable — need to keep losses small via tight SLs. Capital preservation > activity."
}
